data.title: Empire State Realty Trust declares $0.035/share dividend for Q4 2025 for holders of Class A and B stock, ESRO units.
data.description: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.035 per share for the final quarter of 2025. This dividend is for holders of the Company's Class A common stock and Class B common stock, as well as for holders of Empire State Realty OP, L.P.'s Series ES, Series 250, and Series 60 operating partnership units (NYSE Arca: ESBA, FISK, and OGCP).

data.title: Global live streaming software market to grow significantly by 2032, driven by cloud, AI, and edge technologies. Major players include YouTube, Twitch, Meta Platforms, Zoom, Streamlabs. Demand rising for real-time digital engagement.
data.description: A recent report titled "Live Streaming Software Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. This market is currently in a period of transformation due to advancements in cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and edge technologies. Organizations and content creators globally are adopting advanced streaming solutions to keep pace with increasing demands for immediate digital interaction. The Live Streaming Software Market is witnessing significant growth, with current data reflecting a substantial market size and an upward trajectory expected in the coming years.

data.title: Global food robotics market forecasted to reach $11.07 billion by 2032, growing at CAGR of 14.38% annually. Regulatory shifts driving adoption of blockchain-enabled robotics.
data.description: A report titled "Food Robotics Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, revealing significant growth in the market. Starting at USD 3.77 billion in 2024, the Food Robotics Market surged to USD 4.31 billion in 2025. Projections suggest a continued rise, with expectations to reach USD 11.07 billion by 2032, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.38%. This research report delves into the changes occurring in the global food industry due to robotics, offering a detailed analysis of the market dynamics.

data.title: Automotive Grade Linux launches open source SoDeV Reference Platform to accelerate software defined vehicles, announced on Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: Today in San Francisco, on December 5, 2025, the Automotive Grade Linux (AGL) organization unveiled SoDeV, a fresh open-source SDV reference implementation aimed at facilitating software-oriented development in the automotive industry. AGL, known for creating an open platform for connected car technologies through collaboration across industries, introduced this innovative solution to enhance the efficiency of software development within the sector. SoDeV promises to revolutionize the way connected car technologies are integrated, providing developers with a powerful tool to drive progress in the automotive software landscape.

data.title: APhA expresses disappointment over CDC's ACIP decision to remove universal recommendation for hepatitis B vaccine birth dose.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, the American Pharmacists Association expressed profound disappointment with the CDC's Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices' decision to eliminate the universal suggestion for the hepatitis B vaccine birth dose.

data.title: USF and Old Dominion to play in 2025 StaffDNA Cure Bowl at Camping World Stadium on Dec. 17 at 5:00 pm EST.
data.description: The StaffDNA® Cure Bowl organizers revealed the participating teams for the upcoming match scheduled for Wednesday, December 17, 2025, at 5:00 pm EST. The event will be held at Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Florida. The University of South Florida (USF) Bulls are set to compete against Old Dominion.

data.title: FDA warns against Abbott Glucose Monitor sensors due to 700 injuries, 7 deaths. Inaccurate readings prompt alert for diabetes users.
data.description: In December, the FDA issued a safety alert advising individuals with diabetes to discontinue the use of specific glucose sensors produced by Abbott Laboratories' Diabetes Care, as the company has linked these devices to seven fatalities and hundreds of severe injuries. The affected FreeStyle Libre 3 sensors have been found to potentially display falsely low glucose levels, leading to risky treatment choices. Regulators cautioned that these inaccuracies could result in users consuming inappropriate amounts... Meanwhile, shares of Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) are currently in a consolidation phase. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trump's proposed national cryptocurrency reserve unlikely to be operational in 2025, with Polymarket traders now assigning almost zero probability. White House announced initiative in March but lacks execution. Bitcoin, ETH, and XRP part of reserve plan.
data.description: Traders on Polymarket now estimate a negligible chance that the Trump administration's proposed national cryptocurrency reserve will be operational by 2025, a significant drop from initial expectations. This development comes after the White House announced its policy in March, outlining plans for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and a U.S. Digital Asset Stockpile. The executive order directed federal agencies to consolidate seized Bitcoin and other digital assets, with a mandate against selling reserved Bitcoin. President Trump later mentioned intentions to include Ethereum, XRP, Solana, and Cardano in the reserve. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Winter approaches early, with freezing temperatures across U.S. and Canada. Homeowners urged to prepare roofs for snow.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on December 5, 2025, it was confirmed that while the official start of winter is on December 21, unusually cold weather with freezing and sub-zero temperatures has descended upon a large part of the United States and Canada. This sudden onset serves as a timely warning for homeowners to take necessary precautions in safeguarding their roofs against snow and ice. It is significant due to the potential for adverse weather conditions impacting properties and individuals across the regions affected.

data.title: NexusTek boosts email security with AI tech to counter cyber threats; offers 24/7 SOC monitoring.
data.description: NexusTek, a prominent AI, infrastructure, and security solutions provider, introduced enhanced measures to protect organizations from sophisticated cyberattacks. Their strategy includes real-time prevention, detection powered by artificial intelligence, and continuous security operations center monitoring all year round. The company revealed this development on December 5, 2025, based in Denver.
